text:
今までの特訓、簡単すぎたかなー？
あんまり特訓になってなかったもんね。

でも今回のは文句なしだと思うな！
いやー、もう超すごい難しいんだから！

海岸探索をＳランクでクリアなんて
考えただけでクラクラしそう……
え、そうでもない？

いやいやなめたらいけないよー？
よーく考えて戦わないと、あなたが
びしっとやられちゃうかもよー？

I know I've been saying this training is going
well and all, but do you think it's been a bit
too easy? Maybe you need something more.

That's why I went and outdid myself this time,
and put together the most hardcore training
regimen you'll ever put yourself through!

Doesn't the mere thought of pulling off an S
Rank finish on an expedition on the coast give
you the chills? ...It doesn't?

Don't go fooling yourself, now! You'll have to
really use that noggin of yours to get through
this without winding up full of holes yourself.
